final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 character expression grid illustration inspired by the 仙剑奇侠传 character 赵灵儿 IP aesthetic.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation, Pixar-style aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 3×3 grid layout, 9 panels total, each character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include all 9 panels with 赵灵儿-inspired young woman (long flowing light-colored hair, delicate fairy-like features, ethereal charm), each panel a unique expression + action + outfit combination:
  Top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include torn white paper hole framing for each of the 9 panels
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, lively, playful atmosphere — exact light setup is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, varied direction matching each panel's outfit color — exact palette ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished 3D render surface treatment — exact sheen and texture detail are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all 9 panels in correct 3×3 grid positions; character must maintain consistent 赵灵儿-inspired appearance across all panels; each panel must show a distinct expression and action as listed
Avoid: must avoid mixing up panel positions or expressions; avoid flat 2D illustration style
